message:
🐛 Fix tmux attach blank screen + rename Terminal to Bidirectional (#38)

- Use tmux new-session -t (grouped session) instead of attach-session
  to avoid nested tmux conflict that caused blank screen
- Enable mouse/window-size/aggressive-resize on attached sessions
- Rename top nav tab from 'Terminal' to 'Bidirectional'
- Rename default tab name from 'Terminal N' to 'Shell N'

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
